paperTitle: Evolve Jailbreak Methods, Not Just Prompts
content:
## Evolve Jailbreak Methods, Not Just Prompts

Generate adversarial attacks on LLMs through method evolution rather than prompt optimization, discovering novel jailbreak strategies automatically.

### Core Concept

Evolutionary synthesis of attack methods for systematic LLM evaluation

### Key Techniques

This skill focuses on implementing approaches from research in agent reasoning, model optimization, and system scaling.

### Implementation

For implementation details, refer to the source paper at https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.12710

### Practical Guidance

- **When to use**: When testing LLM robustness or developing adversarial evaluation methods
- **Integration**: Use with other agent skills for comprehensive systems
- **Scaling**: Consider performance trade-offs when applying at scale

### Reference

Paper: Evolve the Method, Not the Prompts: Evolutionary Synthesis of Jailbreak Attacks on LLMs
arXiv: https://arxiv.org/abs/2511.12710
